aboutText: KOH HOUSE was founded with an unwavering belief that exceptional art transforms spaces and lives. Located in the heart of London, we represent a carefully curated portfolio of artists whose work spans contemporary, abstract, and figurative traditions. Every piece in our collection is chosen for its ability to provoke, inspire, and endure.
pressQuote: One of London's most exciting new gallery spaces.
